name: agent-improvement
description: Skill observability: record skill invocations, review runs at session end or in-session, and aggregate reviews into skill improvements

watched_skills.title: Watched skills
watched_skills.description: Comma-separated skill names to watch, as they appear at invocation (e.g. 'knowledge-vault:search, dev-utils:brainstorming'). Use * to watch all skills. Empty disables recording.

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Where invocation state and review notes are stored. Default: ~/.claude/agent-improvement
